svg.title: usesteady: non-idempotent → re-prompt
svg.desc: UseSteady survivability demo: 03-non-idempotent — animated terminal recording rendered as deterministic SVG. Reproduce: node scripts/p2-render-demo-assets.mjs
svg.text: $ # Spec has a run_command (non-idempotent) followed by a write_file.
File note: If DEPLOY.md already exists, the operation will fail (target_exists).
Resume refused: 1 task(s) cannot be idempotency-checked.
Pass --reexecute-non-idempotent to opt in to re-prompting on those tasks.
Run `usesteady workflow resume-info` for the full per-task report.
→ requires_reconfirm: op type "run_command" is not idempotency-checkable; operator must confirm
No execution occurred. No tasks ran. No workspace changes.
$ # Resume WITH the explicit opt-in: proceeds.
File note: If DEPLOY.md already exists, the operation will fail (target_exists).
